question: How do I reset my Sujith email password?
answer: Visit the Self-Service Portal at it.sujith.com/reset, enter your employee ID, and follow the steps to reset your password via OTP sent to your registered mobile number. If you're locked out, call the IT Helpdesk at ext. 1010.

question: How do I connect to the company VPN from home?
answer: Download the GlobalProtect VPN client from the Software Portal (software.sujith.com). Log in using your corporate credentials. For first-time setup, refer to the VPN Setup Guide in the IT Knowledge Base.

question: My laptop is running very slowly. What should I do?
answer: First, try restarting your laptop and clearing the browser cache. If the issue persists, raise an IT ticket via it.sujith.com/tickets with details (model, OS, issue description). An IT technician will schedule a remote or in-person session within 24 hours.

question: How do I request access to a specific software or application?
answer: Submit a Software Access Request via the IT Portal under 'Access Requests'. Your manager must approve the request first. Once approved, IT will provision access within 2 business days.

question: What should I do if I receive a suspicious phishing email?
answer: Do NOT click any links or attachments. Report it immediately by forwarding the email to security@sujith.com and delete it from your inbox. The cybersecurity team will investigate within 4 hours.

question: How do I set up my work email on my mobile phone?
answer: Go to Settings > Accounts > Add Account > Exchange. Use your corporate email (name@sujith.com) and corporate password. The server address is mail.sujith.com. Enable sync. Refer to the Mobile Setup Guide on the IT Portal for screenshots.

question: My computer won't turn on. What are the steps to follow?
answer: Check that the power cable is properly connected and the power outlet is working. Try holding the power button for 10 seconds. If it still doesn't start, raise an urgent IT ticket (Priority: High) via the IT Portal or call the helpdesk at ext. 1010.

question: How do I join a Microsoft Teams meeting?
answer: Click the meeting link in the calendar invite or email. Teams will open (or prompt you to install it). Sign in with your Sujith corporate email. You can also download Teams from the Software Portal free of charge.

question: What are the approved file-sharing tools at Sujith?
answer: Sujith approves SharePoint and OneDrive for internal file sharing. For external sharing with vendors or partners, use the Secure File Transfer Portal (sftp.sujith.com). Personal cloud storage (Google Drive, Dropbox, etc.) is not permitted for company data.

question: How do I get a new laptop or device?
answer: Raise a Device Request via the IT Portal under 'Hardware Requests'. Your department head must approve it. New devices are provisioned within 5 business days for standard models. Urgent requests are handled within 48 hours.

question: Is there a time limit for IT support response?
answer: Yes. Critical issues (system down, security breach) are addressed within 2 hours. High priority (limited work capability) within 8 hours. Medium priority (workaround available) within 24 hours. Low priority (minor issue) within 3 business days.

question: How do I transfer data from my old laptop to a new one?
answer: Ensure all data is backed up to OneDrive before returning your old laptop. IT will assist with the data migration during the device handover session. Schedule a migration appointment through the IT Portal.
